basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Ocean Technology (NIOT), Chennai
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Ocean Technology (NIOT) Recruitment 2026 has announced 01 vacancy for the post of Junior Translation Officer. Candidates with M.A can apply online through the official NIOT website, niot.res.in. The online application process is open until 15 June 2026.

how_to_apply: Candidates must apply online through the official NIOT recruitment portal: https://niot.res.in/recruitment_details.php
seo_tags: NIOT Junior Translation Officer Recruitment 2026 – Apply Online
